allow: PowerShell(if \($env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY\) { Write-Host "Key found: $\($env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.Substring\(0,8\)\)..." } else { Write-Host "Not set" })

PowerShell(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/feedback" -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('feedback count:', len\(d['data']\)\)")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/insights" -UseBasicParsing; $d = $r.Content | python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']; print\(f'Clusters: {len\(d[chr\(99\)+chr\(108\)+chr\(117\)+chr\(115\)+chr\(116\)+chr\(101\)+chr\(114\)+chr\(115\)]\)} | Opportunities: {len\(d[chr\(111\)+chr\(112\)+chr\(112\)+chr\(111\)+chr\(114\)+chr\(116\)+chr\(117\)+chr\(110\)+chr\(105\)+chr\(116\)+chr\(105\)+chr\(101\)+chr\(115\)]\)}'\)" 2>&1; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/prd" -UseBasicParsing; $r3 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/tickets" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "PRDs:" \($r2.Content | python -c "import json,sys; print\(len\(json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']\)\)" 2>&1\); Write-Host "Tickets:" \($r3.Content | python -c "import json,sys; print\(len\(json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']\)\)" 2>&1\))

PowerShell(Write-Host "=== Pipeline Status ==="; \(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/pipeline/status" -UseBasicParsing\).Content | python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']; [print\(f'  {k}: {v}'\) for k,v in d.items\(\)]")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 7; $urls = @\("http://localhost:8000/api/v1/pipeline/status","http://localhost:8000/api/v1/insights","http://localhost:8000/api/v1/prd","http://localhost:8000/api/v1/tickets"\); foreach \($url in $urls\) { $r = Invoke-WebRequest $url -UseBasicParsing; $d = \($r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\); $label = $url.Split\("/"\)[-1]; Write-Host "$label => status:$\($d.status\) data_type:$\($d.data.GetType\(\).Name\)" })

PowerShell(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3 | Select-Object StatusCode; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3 | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content)

PowerShell(Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:8000/health" -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content; Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:3000" -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object StatusCode)

PowerShell(Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/insights" -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('clusters:', len\(d['data']['clusters']\), '| opps:', len\(d['data']['opportunities']\)\)")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse "C:\\Users\\Admin\\Desktop\\Claude code\\ai-product-manager\\ai-product-manager" | Where-Object { !$_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\("C:\\Users\\Admin\\Desktop\\Claude code\\ai-product-manager\\ai-product-manager\\", ""\) } | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch "node_modules|\\.next|__pycache__|\\.pyc|ai_pm\\.db" })
